name: Crocked Kielbasa
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Pitted black olives (drained and left whole)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, sauté ground beef until browned.
2. Transfer the meat to the crockpot.
3. Add all other ingredients except pasta and parmesan to the crockpot.
4. Simmer on low for 6-8 hours.
5. Cook pasta according to package directions.
6. Ladle the Crocked Kielbasa over the cooked pasta in large bowls.
7. Pass freshly grated Parmesan cheese for garnish.
